sentences.enText: What do you like to do?
Yes, I go to the gym
What would you like to eat?
What would you like to drink?
Can you give me a discount?
Do you have a smaller size?
Do you have a larger size?
Do you have this in another color?
I would like to try this on
Can I pay with my phone?

sentences.zhText: 你们的退货政策是什么？

sentences.enText: Can you ship this to my address?
sentences.zhText: 你能把这个送到我的地址吗？

sentences.enText: I would like to book a room
Do you have any rooms available?
How much is a room per night?
Does the room have air conditioning?
Can I have a wake-up call?
sentences.zhText: 我能要一个叫醒电话吗？

sentences.zhText: 最近的自动取款机在哪里？

sentences.zhText: 你能把这个送到我的地址吗？

sentences.enText: I would like to book a room
Do you have any rooms available?
How much is a room per night?
Does the room have air conditioning?
Can I have a wake-up call?
sentences.zhText: 我能要一个叫醒电话吗？

sentences.enText: Where is the nearest police station?

sentences.zhText: 最近的自动取款机在哪里？

sentences.enText: How do I get to the airport?
How do I get to the train station?
sentences.zhText: 我怎样才能到达火车站？

sentences.enText: How do I get to the bus station?
sentences.zhText: 我怎样才能到达汽车站？

sentences.enText: Can you call a taxi for me?
sentences.zhText: 你能为我叫一辆出租车吗？

sentences.enText: How much is a taxi to the airport?
sentences.zhText: 到机场的出租车要多少钱？

sentences.enText: What do you like to do?
Yes, I go to the gym
What would you like to eat?
What would you like to drink?
Can you give me a discount?
Do you have a smaller size?
Do you have a larger size?
Do you have this in another color?
I would like to try this on
Can I pay with my phone?
